excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap-RoPE replaces RoPE
a claim that this nonlinear routing bridge is a matched decoder-only transformer
a claim that nonlinear support routing is positional-method promotion evidence when no-position solves too
supported: A no-credential same-seed support-complete audit that trains a nonlinear per-position routing bridge over learned support probabilities.
Evidence about whether Stage82's compact scalar routing failure is explained by insufficient learned routing capacity.

decision.claim_boundary: Support labels are recovered, but nonlinear learned support-to-token routing still does not repair phase-cued retrieval.

model.value_output_mode: deterministic copied prefix-token mass with a nonlinear learned per-position bridge over support-congruence, positional-bias, distance, and interaction features for phase-cued rows

support_complete_policy: examples_per_length=6 restores same-seed phase-cued query-support coverage for held-out rows
